entity.summary: Melbourne-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange whose public beta began on April 16, 2018 after registration with AUSTRAC. The former exchange website is now offline, but no reliable first-party closure announcement or exact terminal date has been recovered, so HEI classifies Blockbid as inactive rather than dead.
entity.notes: The April 16 date is the public beta launch marker. Contemporary reporting discussed a later full-scale launch, but the beta offered cryptocurrency and fiat trading and is used as the service launch for HEI. The current domain failure does not by itself establish a shutdown date or death reason.

events.title: Blockbid opened its public beta exchange
events.description: Blockbid began its public beta and early-access exchange program with cryptocurrency and fiat trading on April 16, 2018.
events.notes: Used as the service launch marker because the beta provided actual trading functionality.

events.title: Blockbid received AUSTRAC registration before beta launch
events.description: Blockbid announced that it had been registered and approved by AUSTRAC to operate as an Australian digital-currency exchange before its public beta launch.
events.notes: Positive licensing milestone; it is not modeled as an enforcement action.

evidence.title: Australian Cryptocurrency Exchange Blockbid Announces Beta Launch
evidence.notes: Syndicated company announcement states that the beta program would commence on April 16 with crypto and fiat trading.

evidence.title: New Australian cryptocurrency exchange Blockbid to launch April beta
evidence.notes: Independent contemporaneous coverage corroborates the April 2018 beta launch plan and Melbourne operating identity.

evidence.title: Blockbid Receives AUSTRAC License Prior to Beta Launch
evidence.notes: Independent financial-industry coverage records AUSTRAC approval and the April 16 beta date.

evidence.title: Blockbid granted Australian license for operating cryptocurrency exchange
evidence.notes: Corroborates the registration milestone and announced beta launch.

evidence.title: Blockbid exchange domain status
evidence.notes: Current profile reports the former blockbid.io exchange website offline, supporting inactive status without establishing a formal closure date.
